subcodes.first_line: O thou who art sore afflicted in the path of God! The tribulations that beset thee in the pathway of the All-Merciful are as waves upon an endless sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبتلای در سبیل الهی بلایای آنجناب در سبیل رحمن چون دریای بی پایان موجها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for tests and difficulties, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
